title: UK GOV MIL WINDRM51
short description: UK GOV/MIL "WinDRM51" variant. Unknown purpose, But link between UK & Cyprus has been found some years ago.
description:
Signal found 2016 January 3rd T18-58-46Z 9104.6kHz

**IDENTIFIED** It's the UK GOV/MIL "WinDRM51" variant, supposed idle only, seen on many freqs in the past, for unknown purpose yet. But link between UK & Cyprus has been found some years ago. Credit: Linkz -- [Cartoonman](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/User:Cartoonman) ( [talk](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/User talk:Cartoonman)) 08:59, 18 January 2016 (NZDT)

It is a special case of OFDM, using only one of every two symbols.
